package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for mixed_receiver_kinds: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Use consistent pointer receivers for all methods on a type
type Account struct {
    ID   string
    Name string
}

func (a *Account) GetName() string {
    return a.Name
}

func (a *Account) SetName(name string) {
    a.Name = name
}

func (a *Account) GetID() string {
    return a.ID
}

func (a *Account) SetID(id string) {
    a.ID = id
}
